query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: An institutional waiting room with five empty wooden chairs with patterned upholstery arranged against pale yellow walls. A CRT television mounted high in the corner displays figures on screen, positioned above a yellow floor stand. A framed sign with text hangs on the left wall, and a telephone or intercom is mounted on the right wall. The floor is tiled with a dark transition strip.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An empty institutional waiting room with five worn wooden chairs against walls suffused with a sickly yellow cast. A CRT television glows high in the corner above a metal stand, while the vacant chairs, clinical signage, and aged fixtures create an atmosphere of melancholy and unease. The sulfurous tint and sterile stillness evoke dread and institutional stagnation.
